stories.headline: Anthropic's Mythos AI Exposes Critical DeFi Security Flaws
stories.tldr: Anthropic's unreleased Mythos AI model discovered thousands of zero-day vulnerabilities in critical crypto infrastructure, prompting an emergency meeting between Treasury Secretary Bessent and bank CEOs.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: If AI can find and exploit vulnerabilities in TLS, AES-GCM, and SSH at near-zero cost, every DeFi protocol built on these foundations is at risk — and the industry's security model needs a fundamental rethink.
the_details: Mythos found a 27-year-old bug in OpenBSD for under $50 in compute and a 16-year-old flaw in FFmpeg missed by 5M automated scans
Project Glasswing launched with 12 partner orgs for defensive security — Anthropic has no plans to publicly release the model
Treasury Secretary Bessent and Fed Chair Powell convened an urgent meeting with bank CEOs over the systemic implications

stories.headline: Bitcoin Hits $73K as Core CPI Cools Despite 3.3% Headline
stories.tldr: Bitcoin climbed to $73,000 after March core CPI came in at 0.2% — below the 0.3% forecast — even as headline inflation hit 3.3% driven by war-related oil prices.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: The split between hot headline CPI (energy-driven) and cool core CPI gives the Fed room to hold rates steady, which is bullish for risk assets including crypto.
the_details: Headline CPI rose 0.9% in March with gasoline up 21.2% due to Strait of Hormuz disruptions from the Iran conflict
Core CPI (ex-food/energy) rose just 0.2% MoM and 2.6% YoY, both below consensus
BTC rallied from $68K to $73K in four days spanning the ceasefire announcement and CPI release

stories.headline: SEC Sends 'Regulation Crypto' Safe Harbor to White House
stories.tldr: SEC Chair Paul Atkins confirmed the commission's crypto safe harbor proposal — including startup exemptions and a decentralization path out of securities law — has been sent to the White House for review.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: This is the most concrete step yet toward a federal regulatory framework for crypto, and the safe harbor could let token projects raise funds legally without full securities registration.
the_details: Three components: startup fundraising exemption, broader capital-raising flexibility, and investment contract safe harbor for decentralized tokens
OIRA (White House regulatory review office) must sign off before formal publication
CLARITY Act also advancing — SEC roundtable scheduled for April 16, Banking Committee markup deadline end of April

stories.headline: Japan Reclassifies Crypto as Financial Instruments in Historic Shift
stories.tldr: Japan's cabinet approved legislation moving crypto from the Payment Services Act to the Financial Instruments and Exchange Act, bringing digital assets under the same framework as stocks and bonds.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Japan's third-largest economy treating crypto like traditional securities opens the door to institutional capital, enables a flat ~20% crypto tax rate, and sets a regulatory template other Asian nations may follow.
the_details: Insider trading on non-public crypto information now banned; mandatory annual disclosures required from issuers
Penalties for unregistered operations jump from 3 to 10 years prison and fines up to 10M yen
If passed by the Diet, reforms take effect fiscal 2027 — crypto tax drops to flat ~20% aligned with equities

stories.headline: Bitmine Hits 4.8M ETH, Uplists to NYSE With $4B Buyback
stories.tldr: Bitmine Immersion Technologies now holds 4.8 million ETH worth over $10 billion — 3.98% of circulating supply — and began trading on the NYSE with an expanded $4 billion share buyback program.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Bitmine is doing for ETH what Strategy did for BTC, but with a yield advantage — 3.33M staked ETH generates ~$196M in annual staking revenue, a recurring income stream Strategy's bitcoin treasury lacks.
the_details: Total crypto and cash holdings: $11.4B including $864M cash, 198 BTC, and 4.803M ETH
Staking through Mavan validator network launched this week at 2.78% yield
Shares uplisted from NYSE American to full NYSE on April 10; buyback expanded from $1B to $4B

stories.headline: Strategy Reports $14.5B Unrealized Loss on Bitcoin in Q1
stories.tldr: Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy) disclosed a $14.5 billion unrealized loss on its 766,970 BTC holdings for Q1 2026, as bitcoin traded well below its average cost basis.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: The massive paper loss highlights the risk of corporate bitcoin treasury strategies during prolonged drawdowns, even as Strategy continues buying — adding 4,871 BTC in early April alone.
the_details: Total holdings: 766,970 BTC with an average cost basis of ~$75,644 per coin
BTC trading around $73K puts the entire position underwater on average
Riot Platforms also sold $290M in BTC during Q1; MARA sold $1.1B worth in March pivoting toward AI compute

stories.headline: Institutional DeFi Accelerates: Repo Markets Move On-Chain
stories.tldr: Major banks including BNP Paribas, Societe Generale, and UBS are actively migrating segments of the $12.5 trillion repo market onto Ethereum's public blockchain.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Repo markets are the plumbing of global finance — moving them on-chain validates Ethereum as institutional-grade infrastructure and could drive massive TVL growth in DeFi protocols.
the_details: Tokenized U.S. Treasuries crossed $12.88B in distributed asset value, up 31% in 30 days
Apollo Global signed a deal to acquire up to 9% of Morpho governance tokens over 4 years for DeFi lending infrastructure
Ethereum Foundation completed its 70,000 ETH staking target; ERC-8211 standard published for AI agent DeFi execution
